artifacts.summary: Analysis of IRR case wiring options, recommending restructure to prove valid_dense directly

summary: The IRR case in soundness_dense cannot be directly wired to irr_sound_dense_at_domain due to a scope mismatch: ih provides model-specific validity while the theorem requires universal valid_dense. Recommended approach: restructure soundness_dense to prove valid_dense directly (like derivable_valid_and_swap_valid pattern), enabling direct application of irr_sound_dense_at_domain. Domain restriction (h_dom) is semantically necessary but satisfied in canonical model applications.
